implementation_cross_check.notes: Used only to cross-check model(linear), exogenous long-debt rule, variable names, shock names, and timing shifts; Dynare was not run.

formula_quality.main_equation_source: paper log-linearized model equations plus nonlinear appendix steady-state equations
uncertain_items: MinerU OCR spacing around some equation tags and symbols, especially Appendix notation, should be checked against PDF before reviewed status.
Paper equation (53) writes production with k_t, while the implementation uses k(-1); this is treated as a timing convention shift.
Rep-MMB implementation contains both investment-bond and government-bond return equations for r2; interpretation should be reviewed before using as a complete runnable source.
